findings.evidence: `rg -n "fixedOnSubgroup|boundaryFixingSubgroup" code/TauCeti mathlib/Mathlib -g '*.lean'` returns no hits, while lines 23-24 list only the raw `_root_.fixingSubgroup ... (I.boundary M)` as the main definition.
findings.fix: Add minimal public abbrevs/defs for `fixedOnSubgroup I n s` and `boundaryFixingSubgroup I n`, plus the corresponding membership restatements against `f x = x`; then state the forgetful lemmas using those names.
findings.issue: No public `Diffeomorph.fixedOnSubgroup` or `Diffeomorph.boundaryFixingSubgroup` declaration is provided, so downstream code has no stable relative diffeomorphism-group name and must spell `_root_.fixingSubgroup (M ≃ₘ^n⟮I, I⟯ M) ...` everywhere.

summary: The PR does not expose the named relative diffeomorphism subgroup API needed by the roadmap target; it only asks users to use the generic root `fixingSubgroup` term directly.
